hooks.command: bash -c '[[ "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" == *.py ]] && ruff format "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" && ruff check --fix "$CLAUDE_FILE_PATH" 2>/dev/null || true' 2>/dev/null || powershell -Command "if ($env:CLAUDE_FILE_PATH -like '*.py') { ruff format $env:CLAUDE_FILE_PATH; ruff check --fix $env:CLAUDE_FILE_PATH 2>$null }"
